COMM::eng: Visit http://myrddinsdream.bandcamp.com
TPE2: Myrddin's Dream
TSRC: USDY41574260
USLT:None:eng: Chorus:
Grey shadows move on a distant shore
stars glisten in the grey twilight
I see You move but I desire to see more
so the colors will flood my eyes

Verse 1:
Through the swirling mists of time
I can see Your face before mine
I can see Your hand moving
but it's a faint outline

Verse 2:
I look back to yesterday
The colors fade to grey
Reaching out to find
I can touch the light divine

Outro:
Through the looking glass, I want to touch
to be with you, I desire so much
I see the shadows, but I want more
Dance in the light upon the distant shores
TDRC: 2014
